text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon in sleepy Willow Creek town, there lived a clever squirrel. His favorite spot was Oakridge orchard. This clever fellow loved apples.

One glorious autumn morning, Oakridge was buzzing with color. He scampered around collecting shiny red apples. Spotting an old trunk hidden among ancient oak trees, Oakley tucked into it hundreds. Before he knew it, night had fallen.

That night he dreamed adventures. Oakley imagined becoming an adventurer exploring distant lands. With his stash of apples.

Onestar morning Oakley woke up. His belly was growling. He imagined a grand feast. He decided he’d explore further. Off he went!

After days wandering through green forests and ancient caves filled with treasure chests, Oakley returned home. His stash grew. Wild tales filled Oakley’s head...

Once Oakley learned to read legends. He dreamed he became a heroic wizard king.

But dreams came crashing down when old Mr. Hawthorne discovered Oakley atop his prized pear tree
